title: Socn's Server Pack
description: A pack originally built for my own SMP server. Featuring optimization mods and Quality-of-Life mods.
body:
**<center>A mod pack that provides optimized and higher-quality minecraft experience.</center>**
<center><font size=2>Originally built for my own server</font></center>

________
**<center><font size=5>Features</font></center>**
- **Hugely Optimized** - more fps than vanilla minecraft.
- **Less Annoying** - get rid of the annoying parts of vanilla minecraft.
- **More Beauty** - smooth GUI, gorgeous shaders, easy-to-get resourcepacks.
- **More Convenience** - convenient and larger storage system, in-game auto clicker and calculator...
- **More Decoration** - use [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted) and [More Chest Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion) to decorate your home!

________
